Finding ID: SEC-001
Specialist: Security Auditor
Severity: Important
Confidence: High
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 42-58
Title: SQL injection in user search endpoint (severity downgraded after review)
Evidence: The search_users function at line 45 has partial parameterization but still allows injection via the sort parameter.
Recommended fix: Parameterize the sort clause as well.
